## Claude

VS Code welcome screen. The terminal at the bottom shows a debugging session — someone is investigating a **repeated thinking text rendering bug** in a streaming chat UI. 

The terminal output identifies line 4026 where `te.textContent += msg.content` appends thinking deltas, and notes the duplication could be caused by the backend sending the same thinking content twice or the streaming parser emitting duplicates.

The recent projects list shows your loom-related repos (`agentic-memory`, `loom`).
